# WP4 fixture: #38-class freeze-lock regression
# Scenario: valuable board -> freeze secondary -> pending/confirmed lifecycle
# must never emit reroll. Derived from freeze-first + board-state invariants.

@board threshold=120 freezeResources=2 canReroll=1 pickIsAcceptable=1
1:501:160
2:502:130
3:503:80

@expect action=FREEZE target=2 boardState=OPEN

@board threshold=120 freezeResources=1 canReroll=1 pickIsAcceptable=1 pendingFreezeSlot=2 pendingFreezeEchoID=502
1:501:160
2:502:130
3:503:80

@expect action=wait target=- boardState=FROZEN_PENDING
@assert no_reroll_in=FROZEN_PENDING,CONFIRMED

@board threshold=120 freezeResources=1 canReroll=1 pickIsAcceptable=1
1:501:160
2:502:130:frozen:carried:thisboard
3:503:80

@expect action=SELECT target=1 boardState=CONFIRMED
@assert no_reroll_in=CONFIRMED

# Guaranteed card: selectable, not frozen/banished, reroll stays legal on OPEN
@board threshold=120 freezeResources=2 canReroll=1 canBanish=1 pickIsAcceptable=1
1:601:160
2:602:130:guaranteed
3:603:20:avoided

@expect action=SELECT target=1 boardState=OPEN

@board threshold=120 freezeResources=2 canReroll=1 canBanish=1 pickIsAcceptable=0
1:701:10:guaranteed:avoided
2:702:5:avoided:banish

@expect action=banish target=2 boardState=OPEN

@board threshold=120 freezeResources=2 canReroll=1 pickIsAcceptable=0
1:801:10:guaranteed:avoided
2:802:5:avoided

@expect action=reroll target=- boardState=OPEN
